# review: af review drives gh + the agent hermetically via script-local
# fakes (same recipe as docs/PRE_RELEASE_SMOKE.md stage 9) and writes a
# draft report under .af/reviews/ without ever posting (ADR-073).
#
# No workstream state exists, so review runs in the "--pr required"
# mode: the report base directory falls back to the cwd ($WORK).
# The default agent resolves to "claude"; the fake answers `claude -p`.
#
# Scenarios:
#   1. --stdout prints the rendered report.
#   2. default run writes <cwd>/.af/reviews/<ts>-pr123.md.
#   3. --out overrides the report path.
#   4. empty PR diff — hard error.
#   5. gh failure — hard error.

env HOME=$WORK/home
mkdir $WORK/home

chmod 755 smbin/gh
chmod 755 smbin/claude
env PATH=$WORK/smbin:$PATH

# ── Scenario 1: --stdout ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
exec af review --pr 123 --stdout
stdout 'Review draft'
stdout 'PR #123 Test PR'
stdout 'Base: main  Head: feat/x'
stdout 'Agent: claude'
stdout 'do not post as-is'
stdout 'Automated review body from fake agent'

# ── Scenario 2: default write goes under .af/reviews/ ─────────────────────────
exec af review --pr 123
stdout 'review: wrote'
stdout '\.af/reviews/.+-pr123\.md'
exists .af/reviews

# ── Scenario 3: --out override ────────────────────────────────────────────────
exec af review --pr 123 --out $WORK/.af/reviews/fixed-pr123.md
stdout 'review: wrote'
exists $WORK/.af/reviews/fixed-pr123.md
grep 'PR #123 Test PR' $WORK/.af/reviews/fixed-pr123.md
grep 'do not post as-is' $WORK/.af/reviews/fixed-pr123.md
grep 'Automated review body from fake agent' $WORK/.af/reviews/fixed-pr123.md

# ── Scenario 4: empty diff is a hard error ────────────────────────────────────
# The fake gh returns an empty body for `gh pr diff 777`.
! exec af review --pr 777
stderr 'pr diff is empty'

# ── Scenario 5: gh failure surfaces as command failed ─────────────────────────
# The fake gh exits 1 for `gh pr diff 500`.
! exec af review --pr 500
stderr 'gh: command failed'

# ── Fakes ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- smbin/gh --
#!/bin/sh
# Fake gh for af review integration tests (ADR-073).
# `pr view <n> --json ...` echoes canned metadata for PR <n>.
# `pr diff 123` returns a small unified diff; `pr diff 777` returns an
# empty diff; anything else fails.
if [ "$1" = "pr" ] && [ "$2" = "view" ]; then
  printf '{"number":%s,"title":"Test PR","headRefName":"feat/x","baseRefName":"main"}\n' "$3"
  exit 0
fi
if [ "$1" = "pr" ] && [ "$2" = "diff" ]; then
  case "$3" in
    123)
      printf 'diff --git a/x b/x\n--- a/x\n+++ b/x\n@@ -0,0 +1 @@\n+hello\n'
      exit 0
      ;;
    777)
      exit 0
      ;;
  esac
fi
echo "fake gh: unexpected argv: $*" >&2
exit 1

-- smbin/claude --
#!/bin/sh
# Fake claude agent: BodyCmd argv is `claude -p`; consume the prompt on
# stdin and print a canned review body.
if [ "$1" = "-p" ]; then
  cat >/dev/null
  echo "Automated review body from fake agent"
  exit 0
fi
echo "fake claude $*"
exit 0
